title: Customizing components with the kubeadm API — ControllerManager flags
text:
For details, see the
reference documentation for kube-controller-manager
.
Example usage:
apiVersion
:
kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind
:
ClusterConfiguration
kubernetesVersion
:
v1.16.0
controllerManager
:
extraArgs
:
-
name
:
"cluster-signing-key-file"
value
:
"/home/johndoe/keys/ca.key"
-
name
:
"deployment-controller-sync-period"
value
:
"50"
